title: Optimize Seed & App Builds — run seed from src (no build) + decouple @repo/schemas from @repo/feedback

tasks.title: Copy feedback schema definitions (client + server) into @repo/schemas
tasks.detail: Move feedbackFormSchema, feedbackEnvironmentSchema, feedbackErrorInfoSchema, feedbackInteractionSchema, all const arrays (REPORT_TYPE_IDS, SEVERITY_IDS, APP_SOURCE_IDS, DEVICE_TYPE_IDS, COLOR_SCHEME_IDS, INTERACTION_EVENT_IDS), and inferred types from packages/feedback/src/schemas/ into packages/schemas/src/feedback.ts (client) and a new server entry for feedbackApiSchema (Buffer). Preserve client/server split.

tasks.title: Update @repo/schemas exports for relocated feedback symbols
tasks.detail: Wire src/index.ts to export the relocated client feedback symbols. Add a server-scoped export path for feedbackApiSchema. Verify all previously-exported symbol names are preserved (additive-only).

tasks.title: Re-wire @repo/feedback/schemas barrels to re-export from @repo/schemas
tasks.detail: Update packages/feedback/src/schemas/index.ts and server.ts to re-export from @repo/schemas instead of local files. Confirm packages/feedback/tsup.config.ts still builds the 4 entry points (index, schemas/index, schemas/server, config/index).

tasks.title: Invert dependency: add @repo/schemas to feedback deps, remove @repo/feedback from schemas deps
tasks.detail: In packages/feedback/package.json: add @repo/schemas to dependencies. In packages/schemas/package.json: remove @repo/feedback from dependencies. Verify no circular dependency (feedback → schemas only).

tasks.title: Typecheck + run @repo/schemas and @repo/feedback test suites
tasks.detail: Run pnpm typecheck repo-wide. Run @repo/schemas and @repo/feedback test suites. Confirm turbo build graph for @repo/schemas no longer includes @repo/feedback or @repo/icons (FR-7). Move any schema parsing tests from feedback to schemas if they exist.

tasks.title: Wire tsx path-resolution for the seed (dedicated tsconfig or resolution plugin)
tasks.detail: Opt the seed's tsx run into tsconfig-path resolution so @repo/* imports resolve to src/index.ts instead of dist/index.js. Scope to the seed only (dedicated tsconfig or seed-local plugin). The path map already exists in packages/typescript-config/package-base.json. Verify other tsx invocations in the repo are unaffected.

tasks.title: Verify all @repo/* deps run from src/ under tsx, document results
tasks.detail: All 8 deps verified: config, logger, utils, schemas, billing, media, db, service-core resolve from src/ under tsx --tsconfig. feedback + icons removed by Front B. No blockers found.

tasks.title: Update db-seed.ts: build default OFF, --build fallback retained
tasks.detail: In scripts/server-tools/src/commands/db-seed.ts: flip build flag to default OFF. Keep --build escape hatch. Update HELP text, flag summary, and inline comments. Add unit tests for parseArgs/formatFlagSummary with new default.

tasks.title: Run seed end-to-end from src/ against real database
tasks.detail: With no dependency dist/ present, run pnpm --filter @repo/seed seed --reset --required --example against a real database. Confirm it completes successfully (FR-1/FR-2 integration test). This is the canonical correctness gate.

tasks.title: Measure seed time before/after and schemas/API build-set delta
tasks.detail: Seed cold startup: ~9s from src/ (vs ~30-60s old build step). Schemas build set: 4 packages (config, logger, typescript-config, utils) — feedback+icons+react subtree eliminated. Seed build set: 10 packages (down from ~16 with feedback transitive deps).

tasks.title: Update operational docs for hops db-seed
tasks.detail: Update scripts/server-tools docs and packages/seed/CLAUDE.md if the operator flow changed. Document the no-build default and --build fallback.

tasks.title: Spec + task index closeout
tasks.detail: Flip spec status to completed in .qtm/specs/index.json. Update .qtm/tasks/index.json with progress 12/12, archived: true. Update Linear BETA-54.
